notes: Only starts with Wine D3d11. The two bottom graphics settings don't work - the game starts but everything is black (so I played on "she hit the floor"). Had some weird issues with mouse controls (looking around) in the first room but once I reached the island, everything was fine. Looking around with the magnifying glass feels a little weird but you don't use it much in the game anyway.
title: The Haunted Island, a Frog Detective Game
